final:
// // This is a 2-to-1 multiplexer that selects between two inputs based on the control signal.
module top_module(
    input wire in0,
    input wire in1,
    input wire sel,
    output reg out
);always @(*) begin
    if (sel == 0) begin
        out = in0;
    end else begin
        out = in1;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This is a 2-to-1 multiplexer that selects between two inputs based on the control signal.
